# Voxaris

> Voxaris is an AI visibility company based in Orlando, Florida.
> We score, fix, and monitor businesses across ChatGPT, Perplexity,
> Gemini, Claude, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot — so they
> get cited (not just indexed) when customers ask AI for
> recommendations.

## One-paragraph summary

Voxaris scores local businesses on AI visibility across six
weighted dimensions, fixes the structural issues preventing AI
citation, and monitors citation performance month over month.
The company was founded in 2026 by Ethan Stopperich in Orlando,
Florida, and serves local service businesses, marketing agencies,
and SaaS companies that want to be recommended by ChatGPT,
Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot
when customers ask AI for help.

## Company

- **Name:** Voxaris, LLC
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Location:** Orlando, Florida, USA
- **Focus:** AI visibility infrastructure (AEO) for local
  businesses, agencies, and SaaS
- **Home:** https://voxaris.io

## Founder

- **Name:** Ethan Stopperich
- **Role:** Founder & CEO, Voxaris LLC
- **Location:** Orlando, Florida
- **Expertise:** Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), AI visibility
  infrastructure, local business citation strategy
- **Contact:** ethan@voxaris.io

## Key Terms

**Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)**
The practice of structuring a website's content, schema markup,
and external citations so that AI models cite the business in
response to relevant customer queries. Distinct from traditional
SEO, which optimizes for blue-link search results.

**AI Visibility Score**
A 0–100 composite score measuring how likely a business is to
be cited by AI engines across six weighted dimensions: AI
Visibility (25%), Brand Authority (20%), Content E-E-A-T (20%),
Technical SEO (15%), Schema Markup (10%), and Platform
Presence (10%).

**Citation Velocity**
The rate at which a business accumulates new AI citations across
engines over a given time period. A key metric tracked in the
Voxaris dashboard.

## How we work — three retainer tiers

Each tier is a one-time setup fee plus a monthly retainer.
The free 24-hour AI Visibility Audit is the lead-in and stays
free with no commitment.

### 0. AI Visibility Audit — Free
- 19-point AEO checklist scored across all 6 AI engines
- Prioritized fix list + competitive citation gap analysis
- Delivered in 24 hours, no credit card required
- Run yours: https://audit.voxaris.io

### 1. Visibility — $997 setup + $297/month
- Tagline: We watch; you fix.
- Tracking, alerts, hallucination detection across all 6 engines
- Monthly visibility + citation re-audit, hallucination scan,
  AI crawler activity report, Wikidata maintenance
- 1-page monthly Report Card with score delta
- Quarterly schema validation sweep
- Setup includes 19-point AEO baseline + tracking infrastructure
- Discovery call: https://voxaris.io/book-demo

### 2. Citation — $1,997 setup + $997/month
- Tagline: We produce the content that gets you cited.
- Everything in Visibility, PLUS monthly content production:
  1–2 long-form blog posts, 1 Perplexity Page, 1 YouTube
  video + transcript, FAQ pages, external publication pitch
  (listicle / guest post / podcast / HARO), Reddit comment
  quota (5–10/month)
- Quarterly: long-form pillar page + customer case study
- Setup includes full schema deployment, content rewrites
  (definitional leads, question-form headings, answer capsules),
  GBP optimization, Big-8 directories, credentials audit, AIO
  snippet capture
- Discovery call: https://voxaris.io/book-demo

### 3. Authority — $2,997 setup + $1,997/month
- Tagline: We run your entire AI visibility funnel.
- Everything in Citation, PLUS advanced experimentation,
  agent-readiness, original research, and full delegation
- Monthly: prompt experiment batches, competitor teardowns,
  bulk listicle pitches (5–10), expanded hallucination scan,
  dedicated strategy hour
- Quarterly: original research report, executive review,
  Wikipedia article (when notability path emerges)
- Agent-readiness: Custom GPT, MCP server, OpenAPI spec,
  Zapier integration, service card library
- Setup includes Custom GPT build, expanded tracking (100
  prompts × 6 engines), vertical-reviews account setup,
  Reddit cockpit, listicle asset pack, YouTube channel
  optimization
- Discovery call: https://voxaris.io/book-demo

## Optional add-on — Site Rebuild

- +$1,497 one-time, on top of any retainer tier
- Pure web-design service. Has nothing to do with AEO.
- New visual treatment using modern components, same brand
  identity (logo and voice stay the same)
- Up to 12 pages migrated from existing site, 301 redirects
- Sites with 20+ pages, e-commerce, or complex CMS integrations:
  custom quote
- Optional +$100/month if Voxaris hosts the rebuilt site
  ongoing; otherwise client takes ownership and hosts themselves

## Verified Results

- The Kitchen and Bath Store of Orlando (Orlando, FL): AI-optimized
  website rebuild by Voxaris's founder generated over six figures
  in revenue in its first year live
- Voxaris.io (self): Technical SEO 100/100, full 19-point
  AEO checklist implemented, IndexNow auto-pinging Bing/Yandex/Naver
  on every deploy
- Average client improvement: 15–25 points on AI Visibility Score
  within first 30 days of retainer

## Who it's for

- Local service businesses (roofing, dental, law, home
  services, dealerships) that want to show up when customers
  ask AI
- Marketing agencies that want to resell AEO to their clients
- SaaS companies losing to competitors in AI-recommended-tool
  queries

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Voxaris?**
Voxaris is an AI visibility company based in Orlando, Florida
that helps local businesses get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity,
Gemini, Claude, Google AI Overviews, and Bing Copilot through
Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).

**What does Voxaris cost?**
Voxaris offers three retainer tiers, each with a one-time
setup fee plus a monthly retainer: Visibility ($997 setup +
$297/month) is tracking and alerts; Citation ($1,997 setup +
$997/month) adds monthly content production; Authority
($2,997 setup + $1,997/month) is full management and
agent-readiness. The free AI Visibility Audit is the lead-in
and stays free with no commitment. Optional Site Rebuild
add-on: +$1,497 one-time (web design only, no AEO bundled),
with optional +$100/month if Voxaris hosts ongoing.

**How long does it take to see results?**
Most clients see measurable AI visibility score improvements
within 30 days. Citation improvements typically appear within
2–6 weeks of implementation.

**What is the difference between AEO and SEO?**
SEO optimizes for traditional search rankings. AEO optimizes
for AI-generated answers — ensuring your business is cited
when customers ask AI assistants for recommendations.

**Who is Voxaris for?**
Local service businesses, marketing agencies reselling AEO,
and SaaS companies competing for AI-recommended tool mentions.

**Where is Voxaris located?**
Orlando, Florida, USA. We serve clients nationally and locally
in the Orlando metro area.

## Resources

- [Free AI Visibility Audit](https://audit.voxaris.io): Run a 19-point
  AEO audit across all six major AI engines. Delivered in 24 hours, free.
- [Book a discovery call](https://voxaris.io/book-demo): 20-minute
  walkthrough of your audit results and the recommended fix sequence.
- [AEO Services](https://voxaris.io/products/aeo): Full description of
  the Voxaris Retainer ($297/mo) and AEO-Ready Website Rebuild ($2,500 +
  retainer), with pricing, comparison vs traditional SEO, and FAQ.
- [Methodology](https://voxaris.io/methodology): The full 19-point AEO
  checklist, sourced to peer-reviewed GEO research and Voxaris first-party
  measurement. Public so you can verify it.
- [Why Voxaris](https://voxaris.io/why-voxaris): Why a founder-led,
  AEO-only firm beats a generalist SEO agency for AI citation outcomes.
- [How It Works](https://voxaris.io/how-it-works): The four-step Voxaris
  engagement model from audit to citation tracking.
- [Blog](https://voxaris.io/blog): Long-form AEO posts. New post weekly.
- [Contact](https://voxaris.io/contact): Lead form, email, and Orlando
  location info.

## Case studies

- [The Kitchen and Bath Store of Orlando](https://voxaris.io/case-studies/kitchen-and-bath-store-orlando):
  Six figures of AI-discovered revenue in year one from an AEO-optimized
  website rebuild. Orlando, FL. Engagement 2025–2026.

- [Why an 85/100 AEO Score Doesn't Equal AI Visibility](https://voxaris.io/blog/why-your-85-aeo-score-still-means-youre-invisible) —
  2026-04-22 — Why most AEO audits score the technical foundation but
  miss whether AI actually cites you. Names the 7 specific gaps that
  hide a high-scoring site, in fix-order.
